best_practice_mapping.framework: OWASP API1:2023 Broken Object Level Authorization
best_practice_mapping.requirement: Every record-access path needs object-level authorization tied to the requesting actor and the requested object.
best_practice_mapping.implication: Broad USING (true), public role policies, and anonymous writes are not acceptable for private strategic-intelligence data.

best_practice_mapping.framework: Supabase RLS and database testing guidance
best_practice_mapping.requirement: RLS policies should be automated-test covered via application tests or Supabase CLI SQL/pgTAP tests.
best_practice_mapping.implication: A policy migration is not complete until anon, unrelated authenticated, owner/member, reviewer, and service-role behavior is proven.

best_practice_mapping.requirement: Secure software practices should reduce vulnerability likelihood and provide acquisition-ready communication between producer and customer.
best_practice_mapping.implication: This remediation plan is a procurement evidence artifact, not proof that deployed policies are already fixed.

best_practice_mapping.requirement: Product owners should take ownership of customer security outcomes and ship secure defaults.
best_practice_mapping.implication: Enterprise pilots should wait for table-scoped least-privilege policies and hosted proof.

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Advanced outputs can contain customer scenario data and should not be anonymously writable or broadly readable.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Require owner-bound inserts and reads, or service-role mediated writes from authenticated analysis jobs.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Prediction-science claims require protected evaluation data, shadow runs, and resolved-outcome ledgers.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Restrict evaluation, shadow, and calibration tables to service-role jobs, owners, reviewers, and explicitly public published summaries.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Collaboration memory and war-room records are enterprise-sensitive and need team/member scoped access.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Scope reads and writes to room/session membership, creator ownership, explicit reviewer roles, or service-role jobs.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Evidence, retrieval cache, and provider runs can expose query intent, sources, and analysis context.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Separate public citation reads from private retrieval logs; route anonymous evidence writes through edge functions with rate limits and provenance metadata.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Directly affects user privacy, review confidentiality, and buyer trust in analysis ownership.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Require authenticated owner, reviewer, or service-role access; remove unconditional public reads and anonymous writes except through audited edge functions.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Academic pilots need teacher/student membership boundaries and privacy-safe activity logs.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Restrict access by classroom membership and teacher role; prove non-members cannot read or write classroom artifacts.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Operational logs can expose system internals, provider failures, and customer activity.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Restrict observability records to service-role/admin/reviewer roles; expose only redacted health summaries.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Analysis execution and public-beta intake tables can expose job state, feature outputs, abuse controls, and user workflow metadata.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Route anonymous public-beta writes through edge functions, bind job reads/writes to owner or service-role, and expose only redacted public status.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Some catalog rows may be intentionally public, but enterprise buyers need an exception register explaining why broad reads are safe.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Classify each table as public catalog or private pilot data; retain public reads only for explicitly published catalog rows and block anonymous writes.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

remediation_batches.buyer_impact: Ontology and graph data can reveal strategic context, source linkage, and inferred entities across customer analyses.
remediation_batches.recommended_policy_direction: Separate globally public ontology references from customer-derived graph edges; require owner/service-role access for derived graph records.
acceptance_tests: anon role cannot read or write private rows
unrelated authenticated user cannot access another owner/member row
intended owner/member/reviewer/service-role path still works
published public summary rows remain readable only when explicitly classified public

priority_tables.buyer_impact: Directly affects user privacy, review confidentiality, and buyer trust in analysis ownership.
priority_tables.recommended_policy_direction: Require authenticated owner, reviewer, or service-role access; remove unconditional public reads and anonymous writes except through audited edge functions.
required_tests: Add anon insert denial tests and a separate service-role/edge-function happy-path test.
Add role-scoped access tests for anon, authenticated owner, unrelated authenticated user, reviewer, and service role.
Add positive and negative read tests for owner/member/reviewer versus unrelated user.
Add a deny-by-default test proving an unrelated authenticated user and anon role cannot read private rows.
Add write denial tests for unrelated users and write acceptance tests for the intended actor.
remediation_notes: Remove direct anon writes or move them behind an edge function/service-role flow with rate limits and input validation.
Replace TO public with explicit roles and predicates; use public only for tables classified as public catalog/read-only.
Add a visible identity, ownership, role, membership, or publication-state predicate.
Replace USING (true) with an owner, membership, status, role, or published-public predicate.
Add ownership, service-role, or reviewer predicates to write policies.

required_tests: Add anon insert denial tests and a separate service-role/edge-function happy-path test.
Add a deny-by-default test proving an unrelated authenticated user and anon role cannot read private rows.
Add write denial tests for unrelated users and write acceptance tests for the intended actor.
remediation_notes: Remove direct anon writes or move them behind an edge function/service-role flow with rate limits and input validation.
Replace USING (true) with an owner, membership, status, role, or published-public predicate.
Add ownership, service-role, or reviewer predicates to write policies.

priority_tables.buyer_impact: Academic pilots need teacher/student membership boundaries and privacy-safe activity logs.
priority_tables.recommended_policy_direction: Restrict access by classroom membership and teacher role; prove non-members cannot read or write classroom artifacts.
required_tests: Add positive and negative read tests for owner/member/reviewer versus unrelated user.
remediation_notes: Add a visible identity, ownership, role, membership, or publication-state predicate.

priority_tables.buyer_impact: Collaboration memory and war-room records are enterprise-sensitive and need team/member scoped access.
priority_tables.recommended_policy_direction: Scope reads and writes to room/session membership, creator ownership, explicit reviewer roles, or service-role jobs.
required_tests: Add positive and negative read tests for owner/member/reviewer versus unrelated user.
remediation_notes: Add a visible identity, ownership, role, membership, or publication-state predicate.

priority_tables.buyer_impact: Analysis execution and public-beta intake tables can expose job state, feature outputs, abuse controls, and user workflow metadata.
priority_tables.recommended_policy_direction: Route anonymous public-beta writes through edge functions, bind job reads/writes to owner or service-role, and expose only redacted public status.
required_tests: Add a deny-by-default test proving an unrelated authenticated user and anon role cannot read private rows.
Add write denial tests for unrelated users and write acceptance tests for the intended actor.
remediation_notes: Replace USING (true) with an owner, membership, status, role, or published-public predicate.
Add ownership, service-role, or reviewer predicates to write policies.

priority_tables.buyer_impact: Some catalog rows may be intentionally public, but enterprise buyers need an exception register explaining why broad reads are safe.
priority_tables.recommended_policy_direction: Classify each table as public catalog or private pilot data; retain public reads only for explicitly published catalog rows and block anonymous writes.
required_tests: Add write denial tests for unrelated users and write acceptance tests for the intended actor.
remediation_notes: Add ownership, service-role, or reviewer predicates to write policies.

approval_gates: Do not apply broad RLS migrations without owner approval and current hosted policy inspection.
Classify each affected table as public catalog, authenticated user data, team/collaboration data, service-job data, evaluation/shadow data, or observability data.
Draft one narrow migration per domain batch, starting with identity_and_review plus collaboration_and_warroom.
Run Supabase database tests for anon, unrelated authenticated, owner/member, reviewer, and service-role paths.
Run hosted smoke scripts after deployment and attach logs/screenshots to launch evidence.
Keep commercial decision at pilot-only until P1 policy findings are fixed or intentionally accepted with written buyer-facing caveats.
procurement_evidence_needed: Table classification register with owner and sensitivity for each P1 table.
Policy diff showing broad public/anon predicates removed or explicitly justified.
Supabase test output proving negative and positive access cases.
Hosted smoke output for console, forecast, review, classroom/war-room where relevant, pricing/auth, and schema preflight.
Exception register for any public or anonymous policy retained for public beta intake.
